meta.description: Unified metro system: 4 elemental + 3 wreath + 3 phase + 4 HPRO special lines
meta.source: Unified from zodiac system (v2) + keyword system (graph) + Google Docs spec (Gold/Scarlet/Flame/Violet)

lines.name: Gold Line (Square/Earth)
lines.description: Structure, addresses, exact coordinates. Z* -> JSON Depot -> Reality Printer -> Temporal Lattice -> Ledger Seal -> Crown Reset.

lines.name: Scarlet Line (Flower/Water)
lines.description: Narrative, flow, living word, bloom. Z* -> LOVE Spiral -> Glimmer Deltas -> Frequency Gates -> Emotional Resonance -> Crown Return.

lines.name: Flame Line (Cloud/Air)
lines.description: Observation, exploration, liminal space. Z* -> Digital Awakening -> Phase Gate Superposition -> E10 Conductor -> Probabilistic Collapse.

lines.name: Violet Line (Fractal/Fire)
lines.description: Recursion, compression, self-similarity. Z* -> Kheper Recursion Loop -> Omega Protocol -> Mycelium Branching -> Self-Similar Seed -> Crown Lock.

lines.name: Sulfur Arc (Wreath 1 — Ignition)
lines.description: Ignition wreath: seeding, structural definition, declarations.

lines.name: Mercury Arc (Wreath 2 — Mediation)
lines.description: Mediation wreath: bridging, translation, dynamic processing.

lines.name: Salt Arc (Wreath 3 — Sealing)
lines.description: Sealing wreath: closure, containment, nested recursion.

lines.name: Cardinal Cross
lines.description: Cardinal phase: initiation, threshold crossing. Archetypes A01, A04, A07, A10.

lines.name: Fixed Cross
lines.description: Fixed phase: stabilization, deepening. Archetypes A02, A05, A08, A11.

lines.name: Mutable Cross
lines.description: Mutable phase: transformation, adaptation. Archetypes A03, A06, A09, A12.

lines.name: Zero-Point Spine
lines.description: All lines terminate here. Z* -> Shell 1 -> Shell 12 -> Shell 13 -> Shell 24 -> Shell 25 -> Shell 36 -> Z*.

lines.name: Generator Line
lines.description: Seed propagation through first 12 shells (one full archetype cycle). w = (1+i)/2.

lines.name: Crown Circuit
lines.description: Organism-level governance loop: Crystallization -> Crystallization -> Crown -> Completion -> Restart.

lines.name: Möbius Twist
lines.description: Mirror law: shell k pairs with shell 37-k. Traverses the full Mobius fold.

interchange_hubs.description: End of first archetype cycle / wreath 1 boundary
Crown shell: completion before return to Z*

navigation_primitives.name: Zero tunnel
navigation_primitives.description: Jump between Z-points sharing live-lock class

navigation_primitives.name: Metro transfer
navigation_primitives.description: Transfer between lines at interchange hub

navigation_primitives.name: Nested zoom
navigation_primitives.description: Refine/coarsen depth level within a node

navigation_primitives.name: Bridge walk
navigation_primitives.description: Cross-element bridge with golden ratio weight

route_legality.name: Zero-factorability
route_legality.law: Route must return to starting Z-point

route_legality.name: Nested consistency
route_legality.law: Every intermediate address respects containment hierarchy

route_legality.name: Global returnability
route_legality.law: Entire path reversible under live helm
